violations.text: The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Marinara was placed hot in the refrigerator in plastic covered containers greater than four inches deep. PIC uncovered food. Food was recently placed in unit. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025
An allergy statement is lacking on the menus. Allergy statement to be added. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Sausage was placed hot in the refrigerator in plastic covered containers. Sausage was within 2 hour cooling period. Sausage was relocated. Proper cooling methods reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025

Food items stored in several refrigeration units were observed held at 43 to 51 degrees Fahrenheit (See Temperatures). Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items observed at 44 degrees Fahrenheit and below were moved to colder refrigeration. Food items observed at 45 degrees Fahrenheit and above were voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024

Pasta was observed cooling in the 2 door reach-in cooler in a covered container at 57 degrees Fahrenheit. Based on time of preparation and temperature observed, pasta was moved to shallow pan for rapid cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024

At the time of inspection, the following equipment was observed in need of adjustment/repair... - The small prep unit was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 51 degrees Fahrenheit with food temperatures observed at 47 to 51 degrees Fahrenheit. - The 2 Door Low Boy Cooler in the back prep area was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 52 degrees Fahrenheit with food temperatures observed at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. - The 2 Door reach-in cooler was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 42 to 43 degrees Fahrenheit. Per the Owner, a prep unit to replace the current prep unit and an additional reach-in cooler is available for replacement by next day. Call was made for adjustment/service to the Low Boy Cooler and the 2 Door Reach-in Cooler at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the mixer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2024
